ddls:
CREATE TABLE "billionaires" (
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billionaire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the billionaire */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the billionaire in the wealth list */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "demographics_age" INTEGER /* Age of the billionaire */,
  "demographics_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the billionaire */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "wealth_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wealth_sources table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billionaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaires_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaires_wealth_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("wealth_source_id") REFERENCES wealth_sources ("wealth_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of company */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the billionaire */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the location */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wealth_sources" (
  "wealth_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wealth source */,
  "wealth_type" TEXT /* Type of wealth (e.g., inherited, self-made, acquired) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of wealth (e.g., Non-Traded Sectors, Financial) */,
  "from_emerging" INTEGER /* Whether the wealth is from an emerging market */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the industries table */,
  "inherited" INTEGER /* Whether the wealth is inherited */,
  "was_founder" INTEGER /* Whether the billionaire was the founder of the company */,
  "was_political" INTEGER /* Whether the billionaire has a political background */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wealth_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wealth_sources_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_company_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the billionaires table */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the companies table */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., founder, CEO, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_company_relationships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_company_relationships_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_teams table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
